bocc.name: Board of County Commissioners
bocc.format: In-person at 200 E. Main St., Commissioners Chambers. Virtual option available: email the Clerk before the deadline.
bocc.clerkName: Clerk to the Board of Commissioners
bocc.location: 200 E. Main St., Durham: Commissioners Chambers
bocc.notes: Sign up online or call (919) 560-0025. You can speak on any agenda item or on any issue during the general public comment period at the start of the meeting.

city-council.name: Durham City Council
city-council.signupDeadline: Day of meeting, by 4:00 PM online or at the start of the meeting
city-council.format: In-person at Durham City Hall, 101 City Hall Plaza. Virtual participation available on some meeting types.
city-council.notes: Fill out the speaker sign-up form on the City's website before 4 PM on meeting day, or sign up in person before the meeting starts.

dps.name: DPS Board of Education
dps.signupDeadline: Day of meeting, before the meeting starts at 5:30 PM
dps.format: In-person at 511 Cleveland St., Durham. Check dpsnc.net for any virtual options.
dps.notes: Sign up with the Board Clerk at the front desk before the meeting starts. There's also a written public comment option: email boardclerk@dpsnc.net before noon on meeting day.
